playlist_strategy: A gradual escalation of intensity designed to break through mental barriers. Starts with focused, driving rhythms for warm-up and mental preparation, building into aggressive, high-BPM bangers for peak lifting and intense cardio, and finishing with a steady, triumphant groove for the final push.

tracks.title: Mental Perimeter
tracks.youtube_title: Mental Perimeter ⚡ Focused Gym Warmup | Zone In
tracks.style_prompt: Dark Synthwave, 105 BPM, C Minor. Deep analog bassline, atmospheric synth pads, crisp 808 drum pattern. Moody, focused, atmospheric. Hook within first 5 seconds using a rolling bass groove. Hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a determined athlete putting on headphones in a dimly lit gym. Neon purple accents cutting through deep shadows. High contrast, shallow depth of field. Intense, focused expression.
tracks.youtube_description: Time to zone in. This dark synthwave track is the perfect warm-up to prep your mind and body. 🎧 Start your session right and leave the excuses at the door. Let's get to work! 💪 #GymMotivation #Synthwave #WarmUpMusic

tracks.title: Iron Activation
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Activation ⚡ Heavy Lifting Pre-Workout | Hype
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial Midtempo, 110 BPM, F# Minor. Distorted mechanical bass, heavy stomping kicks, metallic percussion elements. Gritty, driving, aggressive. Punchy drum loop hook right at the start. Hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a heavily tattooed lifter chalking their hands before a deadlift. Industrial gym setting, steel plates in the background. Deep reds and metallic greys. High contrast, gritty atmosphere.
tracks.youtube_description: Awaken the iron. Gritty industrial midtempo beats designed to hype your nervous system for heavy lifts. 💥 No talking, just raw mechanical energy to fuel your pre-workout ritual. 🏋️‍♂️ #HeavyLifting #IndustrialBass #GymHype

tracks.title: Ignition Sequence
tracks.youtube_title: Ignition Sequence ⚡ Explosive Workout Music | Ignite
tracks.style_prompt: Bass House, 126 BPM, E Minor. Bouncy wobble bassline, driving four-on-the-floor house drums, rhythmic chopped vocal elements. Energetic, bouncy, club-ready. Catchy FM synth riff hook instantly. Hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental focus.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, dynamic shot of a fitness model mid-jump during a box jump. Sweat flying, sharp electric blue and high-vis yellow lighting. High speed capture, frozen action, intense adrenaline expression.
tracks.youtube_description: Ignite your cardio session with high-energy bass house! 🔥 Perfect rhythm to get your heart rate up and keep you moving through the toughest sets. Don't stop now, push the pace! 🏃‍♂️💨 #CardioWorkout #BassHouse #FitnessMusic

tracks.title: Unbreakable Will
tracks.youtube_title: Unbreakable Will ⚡ Hard Trap Workout | Beast Mode
tracks.style_prompt: Hard Trap, 145 BPM, D Minor. Massive brass stabs, speaker-rattling 808 sub bass, rapid-fire trap hi-hats, snare rolls. Aggressive, monumental, hype. Cinematic riser to massive drop hook in 5s. Hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, low angle medium close-up of a muscular powerlifter screaming mid-rep on a heavy squat. Dark gym, dramatic blood-red spotlight illuminating the effort. Absolute maximum intensity and raw aggression. Shallow depth of field.
tracks.youtube_description: Unleash the beast within. Hard-hitting trap beats with massive bass drops crafted for hitting new personal records. 🦍 When the weight feels heavy, this track serves as your unbreakable will. 💯 Let's go! #HardTrap #BeastMode #PRMusic

tracks.title: Apex Predator
tracks.youtube_title: Apex Predator ⚡ Insane Dubstep Gym Music | Unleashed
tracks.style_prompt: Modern Brostep/Dubstep, 150 BPM, G Minor. Violent bass growls, metallic tear-out synths, thunderous kicks and heavy snares. Unstoppable, aggressive, chaotic energy. Instant filthy bass design intro hook. Hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close up of a lifter's chalk-covered hands gripping an olympic barbell tightly. Toxic green rim lighting against a pitch black background. Veins popping, depicting unstoppable, intense power. Macro details.
tracks.youtube_description: Total destruction in the gym. Unapologetic, skull-crushing dubstep for when you need to dig deep and destroy your workout. ☢️ Become the apex predator of the weight room. No mercy. ⛓️ #DubstepWorkout #GymMotivation #ApexPredator

tracks.title: Cardio Overdrive
tracks.youtube_title: Cardio Overdrive ⚡ 170 BPM Drum & Bass Workout | Push
tracks.style_prompt: Neurofunk Drum and Bass, 174 BPM, F Minor. Blistering fast breakbeats, twisted reese basslines, futuristic tech synth stabs. Relentless, frantic, driving momentum. Fast drum fill into main groove as intro hook. Hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, dynamic side-profile of a female sprinter at top speed on a treadmill. Neon hot pink and cyan cyberpunk lighting. Motion blur effect on the treadmill belt but sharp focus on her determined face. Exhilarating speed.
tracks.youtube_description: Hit top speed and stay there! 🏃‍♀️💨 This high-octane 174 BPM Drum & Bass track is pure cardio overdrive for sprints, HIIT, and endurance pushing. Let the rhythm carry you past your limits. ⚡ #DrumAndBass #RunningMusic #Cardio

tracks.title: Titanium Core
tracks.youtube_title: Titanium Core ⚡ Hardstyle Gym Banger | Zyzz Legacy
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric Hardstyle, 150 BPM, A Minor. Signature distorted 'boing' kicks, massive emotional supersaw synth melodies, epic choir pad breakdowns. Triumphant, legendary, massive. Epic saw synth melody hook immediately. Hi-fi modern production.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, iconic pose of a shredded bodybuilder back-lit by golden stadium spotlights and stark white beams. Triumphant, legendary atmosphere. Silhouette emphasizing dramatic V-taper. High emotional impact.
tracks.youtube_description: We're all gonna make it. 🔱 Massive euphoric hardstyle anthems to push you through the most gruelling sets. Feel the titanium core of your willpower. This is what champions listen to. 🏆 #HardstyleGym #Zyzz #GymBanger

tracks.title: Endurance Test
tracks.youtube_title: Endurance Test ⚡ Tech House Workout Mix | Don't Stop
tracks.style_prompt: Tech House, 128 BPM, B Minor. Punchy 4x4 house kicks, hypnotic tribal percussion loops, deep rolling sub bass. Repetitive, trance-inducing, sustained momentum. Snappy percussion hook in 5s. Hi-fi modern production. Instrumental track.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, an endurance athlete profusely sweating while rowing intensely on an ergometer machine. Cool blue and steel lighting palette. Stoic, locked-in determination on their face. Clean, modern gym environment.
tracks.youtube_description: Find your rhythm and lock in. This hypnotic tech house groove is engineered to help you find your flow state during long endurance sets and prolonged cardio. 🚣‍♀️ Just keep breathing and don't stop! 💦 #TechHouseWorkout #EnduranceMusic #FlowState

tracks.title: Victory Lap
tracks.youtube_title: Victory Lap ⚡ Triumphant Phonk Workout | Mission Accomplished
tracks.style_prompt: Drift Phonk, 115 BPM, C# Minor. Signature tuned cowbell melodies, heavily distorted lo-fi bass, punchy Memphis rap inspired drum breakbeats. Gritty, swaggering, victorious. Catchy cowbell drift hook instantly. Hi-fi modern production.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, female athlete leaning against a squat rack after a brutal workout, wiping sweat with a towel. Purple fog effects and harsh overhead white lighting. A smirk of smug satisfaction and absolute victory. Edgy Phonk aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: Mission accomplished. You put in the work, now take your victory lap. 🏁 Gritty drift phonk with serious swagger for your cooldown walk or stretching routine. You earned this. 🥶 #DriftPhonk #GymCoolDown #PhonkWorkout

tracks.title: System Reset
tracks.youtube_title: System Reset ⚡ Chillwave Post-Workout | Recovery & Stretch
tracks.style_prompt: Chillwave, 90 BPM, E Major. Lush reverbed synthesizer chords, soft laid-back drum machine beat, subtle grounding bassline. Relaxing, peaceful, restorative. Gentle swelling synth chord hook. Hi-fi modern production quality. Instrumental.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, wide shot of an athlete doing yoga stretches on an exercise mat in an empty gym. Beautiful soft teal and warm amber morning light streaming through large windows. Peaceful relief and physical recovery.
tracks.youtube_description: Bring your heart rate down and stretch it out. 🧘‍♂️ Beautiful chillwave synths to help you recover, reflect on your hard work, and reset your system for the rest of your day. See you tomorrow. 🌅 #RecoveryMusic #Chillwave #PostWorkout
